title: Junior Investment Banker at Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited in Ghaziabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited:
Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited!
